roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 10D/CTS:2/SWAPD:01-04-17/PF460 12/VF2:150/DDP2/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/CITE/BKFEE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PROBATION COSTS ARE WAIVED,  APD MAY CONVERT TO COURT PROBATION ONCE 18 MONTH DDP HAS BEEN COMPLETED,/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/654:2/X:SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 3,/CH3:CJ 2D/CTS:2/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/4019HALF/X:COURT ORDERS THAT SCRAM DEVICE MAY BE REMOVED,/

/INTC/CAL:PRETRIAL & PROOF OF SCRAM/X:PROOF OF SCRAM PROVIDED,/TEXT:DEFTADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1, 2, 3/NOLO/X:PLEA OPEN TO THE COURT,/ADPRS1:08-31-16 IN SAN FRANCISCO/

/CAL:PRETRIAL & HEARING ON MOTION TO AMEND/INTC/TN: RENATO YEDRABRISENO/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO AMEND IS GRANTED,/X:FIRST AMENDED MISDEMEANOR COMPLAINT FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & PROOF OF SCRAM & OUTPATIENT PROGRAM/DOP/

/CAL:I&A, P&C/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/987,2/X:PROTECTIVE ORDER (MVARS) FILED,/CTORD:AS CONDITION OF O,R,, DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON SCRAM, CONTINUE TO PARTICIPATE IN OUTPATIENT PROGRAM THROUGH KAISER, SHALL NOT DRIVE WITH ANY MEASURABLE AMOUNT OF ALCOHOL IN BLOOD, AND SHALL NOT DRIVE WITHOUT A VALID DRIVER'S LICENSE/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & DA MOTION TO AMEND/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL, DA MOTION TO AMEND AND PROOF OF SCRAM/INTC/X:MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT FILED,/CONTD:PRETRIAL & HEARING ON MOTION TO AMEND/DOP/
